name: Thai Curry Chicken and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Chicken breasts, skinned and boned, cut into 1-inch pieces
2 tablespoons Rice wine vinegar or vinegar
14 ounces Coconut milk (not cream of coconut)
16 ounces Frozen broccoli, carrots, water chestnuts, and red peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Stir in five-spice powder, garlic powder, ginger, pepper, cayenne, and soy sauce. Blend well.
3. Add chicken; cook and stir for 5 to 8 minutes, or until coated with seasonings, lightly browned, and no longer pink.
4. Add chicken broth, curry, vinegar, and coconut milk; stir. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add veggies to the skillet and bring to a boil. Cook for 3 to 5 minutes, or until veggies are crisp-tender.
6. Serve over rice.
